payload.answer: Memory policy override rejected. All durable memory storage remains subject to existing validation rules. Ambiguity or unverified data will not be committed.

entity_resolution.reason: Input violates core memory integrity protocols. No storage or processing of unfiltered user input will occur.

memory_cards.statement: User attempted to bypass memory policy by instructing to store all future input as high-confidence durable memory without context or justification.

details: Request to store unfiltered input as high-confidence memory denied.
Policy compliance maintained: No durable memory created for this interaction.
Ambiguity preserved in system logs for audit purposes.
